name: Turkey Giblet Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour off all turkey fat from the roasting pan into a glass measuring cup. Measure and return 1/4 cup to the pan. Sprinkle flour over the fat; cook and stir for 2 or 3 minutes over low heat.
2. Add water and 2 cups of the reserved turkey stock. Cook, stirring and scraping up browned bits in the pan with a wooden spoon until gravy thickens and bubbles for 2 minutes.
3. Strain the gravy into a saucepan; add chopped giblets and reserved liver. Taste; season with salt and pepper if needed.
